title: pogostemon cristatus
intro: Pogostemon cristatus, also known as Patchouli, is a type of flowering plant in the mint family that is native to Southeast Asia. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Pogostemon cristatus include reducing stress and anxiety, improving skin health, and promoting wound healing, among others. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including essential oils, teas, and infusions, which are often used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
